title: Build
description: A specific versioned build pushed via butler (the itch.io command-line upload tool). Part of the wharf versioned distribution system.

id.description: Site-wide unique identifier generated by itch.io

parentBuildId.description: Identifier of the previous build on the same channel; -1 if this is the initial build

state.description: Current state of the build in the processing pipeline

uploadId.description: ID of the upload (channel) this build belongs to

gameId.description: ID of the game this build belongs to

userId.description: ID of the user who pushed this build

userVersion.description: Developer-specified version string from --userversion flag; not necessarily unique

files.description: Files associated with this build (archive, signature, patch, etc.)
